service_pages.cta_desc: Calculate the price of your new windows online in less than 2 minutes.

ventana.title: Cortizo PVC Windows
ventana.description: High-efficiency PVC windows with Cortizo profiles. Superior thermal and acoustic insulation for your home.
ventana.benefit_1: Exceptional thermal insulation: reduces heat loss by up to 70%
ventana.benefit_2: Superior acoustic insulation: up to 47 dB noise reduction
ventana.benefit_5: Minimal maintenance: easy cleaning and guaranteed durability
ventana.benefit_6: Wide range of colors and finishes available
ventana.faq_1_q: How long does a PVC window last?
ventana.faq_1_a: Cortizo PVC windows have a useful life of 40-50 years with minimal maintenance.
ventana.faq_2_q: How much can you save on heating?
ventana.faq_2_a: With high-efficiency PVC windows you can save between 25% and 40% on your energy bill.
ventana.faq_3_a: Yes, we offer a wide range of colors and wood-effect finishes that adapt to any style.
ventana.faq_4_a: A standard window installation takes 2-3 hours. A complete apartment usually takes 1-2 days.
ventana.faq_5_a: Shutters are optional. We offer integrated shutters in a compact box for a perfect finish.

puerta.title: PVC Sliding Doors
puerta.description: High-quality sliding doors with Cortizo profiles. Maximum natural light and access to your garden or terrace.
puerta.benefit_1: Maximum natural light entry through large glass panels
puerta.benefit_2: Smooth and silent operation with high-quality bearings
puerta.benefit_3: Thermal and acoustic insulation equivalent to PVC windows
puerta.benefit_6: Adaptable to large dimensions to maximize space
puerta.faq_1_q: What is the maximum width of a sliding door?
puerta.faq_1_a: With the Cortizo system, doors can be made up to 3 meters wide per leaf.
puerta.faq_2_a: Yes, they feature multipoint locks and safety glass. Anti-burglary options available.
puerta.faq_3_q: Can they be made with a flush threshold?
puerta.faq_3_a: Yes, we offer the flush threshold option for barrier-free access, ideal for accessibility.
puerta.faq_4_a: Just clean the tracks periodically and lubricate the bearings once a year.

persiana.title: High-Quality Shutters
persiana.description: Durable and efficient shutters. Sun protection, privacy and security for your home.
persiana.benefit_1: Sun protection: full control of light and temperature
persiana.benefit_2: Additional thermal insulation: air chamber between shutter and window
persiana.benefit_3: Enhanced security with aluminum or extruded PVC slats
persiana.benefit_4: Optional motorization with remote control or home automation
persiana.benefit_5: Compact box integration for a clean finish
persiana.faq_1_q: What types of shutters do you offer?
persiana.faq_1_a: We offer aluminum, PVC and polyurethane-filled aluminum shutters for maximum insulation.
persiana.faq_2_a: Yes, all our shutters can be motorized with Somfy motors with remote control or home automation integration.
persiana.faq_3_q: How much does it cost to motorize a shutter?
persiana.faq_3_a: Motorization has an additional cost starting from 150 euros per unit, depending on dimensions.
persiana.faq_4_q: Is it compatible with current windows?
persiana.faq_4_a: Yes, we can install new shutters on existing windows or as part of a complete renovation.

mosquitera.title: Custom Mosquito Nets
mosquitera.description: Professional quality mosquito nets. Insect protection without losing light or ventilation.
mosquitera.benefit_1: Total insect protection while maintaining natural ventilation
mosquitera.benefit_3: Roller, sliding, fixed or pleated systems
mosquitera.benefit_4: Custom-made for any window or door
mosquitera.benefit_5: Quick and clean installation, no construction work needed
mosquitera.faq_1_q: What types of mosquito nets do you offer?
mosquitera.faq_1_a: We offer roller, sliding, fixed and pleated mosquito nets. Each type is suited for different uses.
mosquitera.faq_2_q: How long does a mosquito net last?
mosquitera.faq_2_a: With normal use, a quality mosquito net lasts between 8 and 12 years.
mosquitera.faq_3_q: Can they be installed on sliding doors?
mosquitera.faq_3_a: Yes, sliding and pleated mosquito nets are ideal for terrace doors and balconies.
mosquitera.faq_4_a: Just clean the mesh with mild soap and water once per season.

cortizo.page_desc: Discover why we work with Cortizo profiles. Spanish quality, sustainability and maximum thermal and acoustic insulation.
cortizo.subtitle: Spain's leader in PVC systems for windows and doors
cortizo.story_p1: Cortizo is a Galician company founded in 1972 that has become Spain's leader in aluminum and PVC systems for architecture. With over 50 years of experience, they manufacture in Spain with the highest quality standards.
cortizo.story_p2: Their commitment to sustainability and innovation has led them to develop PVC profiles with the best thermal and acoustic insulation performance on the market, contributing to building energy efficiency.
cortizo.series_c70: Standard 70mm series with 5 chambers. Excellent value for money for most residential applications.
cortizo.series_a84: Premium 84mm series with 6 chambers and triple seal. Maximum insulation for demanding climate zones.
cortizo.series_e170: Lift-and-slide series for large terrace doors. Up to 3m wide per leaf with smooth operation.
cortizo.certs_desc: All Cortizo profiles have the most demanding European certifications, guaranteeing quality and durability.
cortizo.cta_desc: Calculate your quote with Cortizo profiles and discover how much you can save on energy.

subsidies_page.page_desc: Take advantage of European grants to renovate your windows. We handle all the paperwork.
subsidies_page.subtitle: European grants for the energy renovation of your home
subsidies_page.what_p1: Next Generation grants are European funds aimed at improving the energy efficiency of buildings. They cover up to 40% of the cost of window and enclosure renovation.
subsidies_page.what_p2: These subsidies are part of the European recovery plan and are available for private homes, homeowner associations and public buildings.
subsidies_page.req_2: Demonstrable improvement in energy efficiency (energy certificate)
subsidies_page.req_4: Enclosures with thermal transmittance below established limits
subsidies_page.paperwork_desc: Don't worry about the paperwork. ARA FINESTRA manages the entire subsidy application process for you.
subsidies_page.step_1: Technical visit and detailed quote with the necessary specifications
subsidies_page.step_2: Preparation of all documentation and energy certificates
subsidies_page.step_3: Submission of the application to the relevant authority
subsidies_page.step_4: Follow-up of the file until resolution and payment
subsidies_page.amount_desc: of the total cost of window and enclosure renovation
subsidies_page.cta_title: Want to know if you qualify for subsidies?
subsidies_page.cta_desc: Contact us and we'll inform you without obligation about the subsidies available for your home.

legal.privacy_content:
DATA CONTROLLER
ARA FINESTRA, based in Girona, Catalunya, Spain. Email: info@arafinestra.com

PURPOSE OF DATA PROCESSING
Personal data collected through our website and contact forms will be processed for the following purposes:
- Managing quote requests and commercial enquiries.
- Sending information about our services, offers and news (only with prior consent).
- Managing the contractual relationship with our clients.

LEGAL BASIS
Data processing is based on:
- The consent of the data subject (contact forms and subscriptions).
- The performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures (quote requests).
- The legitimate interest of the controller (service improvement).

RECIPIENTS
Data will not be shared with third parties except where legally required. Web hosting and email service providers may have access to the data.

DATA RETENTION
Data will be retained for the duration of the business relationship and for the legally established periods. Commercial contact data will be retained until you request its deletion.

DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS
You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing and portability by sending an email to info@arafinestra.com with a copy of your ID.
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

SECURITY MEASURES
ARA FINESTRA has adopted the necessary technical and organisational measures to ensure the security of personal data.
legal.terms_content:
IDENTIFICATION
ARA FINESTRA, based in Girona, Catalunya, Spain.
Email: info@arafinestra.com

PURPOSE
These terms govern the use of the website arafinestra.com and the contracting of window, door, shutter and mosquito net installation services.

SERVICES
ARA FINESTRA offers PVC joinery installation services with Cortizo profiles. Online quotes are indicative and do not constitute a binding contractual offer. The final quote will be provided after the technical visit.

PRICES AND PAYMENT
Prices shown in the calculator are indicative estimates. The final price will be confirmed in the detailed quote. Payment conditions will be established in the service contract.

WARRANTIES
Installed products are covered by the manufacturer's warranty (Cortizo). The installation warranty covers assembly defects for 2 years.

LIABILITY
ARA FINESTRA is not responsible for:
- Errors or interruptions of the website.
- Content of linked third-party websites.
- Improper use of installed products.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All website content (texts, images, designs, logos) is the property of ARA FINESTRA or its licensors. Reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

APPLICABLE LAW
These terms are governed by Spanish law. The courts of Girona shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.
legal.cookies_content:
WHAT ARE COOKIES?
Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences and improve the browsing experience.

WHAT COOKIES DO WE USE?

Technical cookies (necessary):
- Session cookies: enable navigation through the website. They expire when the browser is closed.
- Language preference cookies: remember the selected language.

Analytical cookies:
- Google Analytics: collect anonymous information about website usage (pages visited, time spent). Purpose: to improve the website.

HOW TO MANAGE COOKIES?
You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling technical cookies may affect the functioning of the website.

- Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
- Firefox: Options > Privacy and security
- Safari: Preferences > Privacy
- Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions

UPDATES
This cookie policy may be updated at any time. The date of the last update is: March 2026.

MORE INFORMATION
For any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at info@arafinestra.com.
